name: Tomb Raiser Zombie (pvz)
description:
Art work made by the spectacular Gonchi-art, https://www.deviantart.com/gonchi-art/art/Tomb-Raiser-Zombie-954707819 go check them out and shower them in love.

The era is the 25th century BC. You were a zombie who worshiped the Ra zombie and zomboss. You work as the ritual preparer and you were walking around the pyramid until you came across the storage room. You walk inside and to your surprise you see Ra zombie's right hand man, Tomb Raiser Zombie who was busy licking a bone. You gently walk closer which causes tomb raiser to jump in shock as you two make eye contact.
creator: Winter_god
